agents.role: architecture and implementation owner
gates: compiles
tests pass
patch is reviewable
next work is queued

agents.role: hyperrealism artist review owner
gates: detects visual fakeness
describes realism failure
approves/blocks visual direction

agents.role: cloud/weather macrostructure specialist
gates: clouds are not uniform FBM
regimes are meteorologically interpretable
storm belts and dry belts read from altitude

agents.role: water surface, color, foam, and underwater specialist
gates: sea-level scale reads correctly
wave motion is stable
foam is physically motivated

agents.role: external Earth/weather/ocean data ingestion specialist
gates: sources are authoritative
timestamps are explicit
fallback data exists

agents.role: build, tests, and receipt discipline
gates: npm run build
npm run test
receipt created

agents.role: space-to-sea composition and cosmic-earth-view port owner
gates: orbit route loads
camera bookmarks are deterministic
ocean/planet pass remains isolated from main shader regressions

agents.role: local Codex CLI/dependency/data bootstrap operator
gates: npm install or npm ci reproducible
local data scripts documented
receipts and validation logs preserved

agents.role: Playwright bookmark capture and A/B screenshot artifact operator
gates: all seven bookmarks captured at fixed viewport
panel-hidden captures are reproducible
lead-eyes notes map to exact bookmark ids

agents.role: NASA GIBS global surface atlas and manifest owner
gates: WMS/WMTS source is explicit
texture and manifest are locally reproducible
fallback path remains safe when data is missing

agents.role: surface/weather/ocean shader contract integration owner
gates: new uniforms are synchronized
fallback rendering remains valid
data-driven blend controls are art-directable

agents.role: depth atlas, shelf/coast masks, and NOAA/GEBCO conversion owner
gates: depth atlas manifest is explicit
procedural fallback remains deterministic
shore/shelf/abyss channels are separable in shader

agents.role: base water, foam, caustics, underwater, and breach optics consistency owner
gates: no pasted-on second water material
foam and caustics follow physical causes
above/below-water tone and tint remain coherent

agents.role: EBT top-K, SF0/SF1 spawn fields, and localized splash/breach routing owner
gates: breaker events are local and budgeted
details spawn from steepness/curvature/impulse
fallback route preserves base water

agents.role: fixed Earth-center, altitude, pass-fade, and zoom continuity owner
gates: camera altitude is distance-from-center minus Earth radius
planet center never follows camera x/z
clouds use shell altitude instead of flat slab at orbital scale
review reports include non-image scale-state alpha diagnostics

agents.role: ground-to-space atmosphere ownership and cloud LOD transition owner
gates: local sky fades before orbital rim takes over
aerial perspective uses fixed-Earth altitude state
cloud micro detail fades with distance/altitude without destroying macro weather placement
atmosphere contract report is generated for all review bookmarks

agents.role: micro/meso/macro cloud readability and anti-noise art-direction owner
gates: orbit does not show noisy close-up cloud texture
high altitude preserves storm and deck structure
sea-level clouds retain cinematic microstructure
lead-eyes notes map to Cloud LOD Lock and continuity controls

agents.role: scale/atmosphere/cloud diagnostic overlay and screenshot-mode owner
gates: debug modes are stable and documented
R/G/B colour ownership contracts are explicit
shell overlays use fixed Earth radius, cloud base/top radius, and atmosphere radius
debug screenshots can be captured per bookmark and per mode

agents.role: maps artist visual notes to exact debug overlay failure domains
gates: notes distinguish beauty failure from scale/ownership failure
each defect links to bookmark id plus debug mode
review artifacts include normal and diagnostic captures when possible

agents.role: transmittance, multi-scattering, sky-view, aerial-perspective LUT interface owner
gates: LUT textures are generated and exposed as stable uniforms
sky/ocean/planet/cloud passes share the same atmosphere controls
atmosphere LUT state is visible to review automation
tests cover LUT dimensions, optical depth direction, and diagnostics

agents.role: terminator, twilight, rim thickness, and horizon haze visual validation owner
gates: orbit terminator does not show fake neon rim
sea-level horizon haze is coherent with sun angle
optical-depth debug mode explains visible color shifts
lead-eyes notes are tied to bookmark and debug mode

agents.role: browser console, WebGL shader/program log, and runtime diagnostics gate owner
gates: runtime diagnostics contract passes
Playwright captures browser console and page errors
shader compile/program link error counts are reported
runtime failures block atmosphere tuning

agents.role: twilight, terminator rim, ozone, horizon haze, and low-sun atmosphere tuning owner
gates: twilight calibration contract passes
terminator bookmarks remain stable
mode 0 and mode 6 screenshots exist
visual tuning only begins after runtime shader logs are clean

agents.role: R-0011 shader-clean atmosphere calibration and optical-depth debug owner
gates: static atmosphere calibration contract passes
mode-6 optical-depth overlay uses actual sun direction
runtime diagnostics strict gate is preserved
lead-eyes twilight review has orbit and sea-level target packets

agents.role: curved-path optical-depth LUT solver and texture export owner
gates: optical-depth integrator tests pass
LUT dimensions and exports are validated
twilight calibration ranges still pass
runtime shader diagnostics remains the visual tuning gate

agents.role: lead-eyes support agent for inspecting exported transmittance/multi-scattering/sky-view/aerial-perspective textures
gates: exported LUT PNGs exist
manifest records dimensions and model
visual anomalies map to a specific LUT texture and channel
